inputs.label: Total Grant Amount
inputs.businessContext: Total number of stock options or shares granted under the vesting plan.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of stock options or shares granted under the vesting plan.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hak ediş planı kapsamında verilen toplam hisse senedi opsiyonu veya hisse sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der im Rahmen des Vesting-Plans gewährten Aktienoptionen oder Aktien.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total d'options d'achat d'actions ou d'actions attribuées dans le cadre du plan d'acquisition.

inputs.label: Vesting Start Month
inputs.businessContext: The month (relative to a reference) when the vesting period begins. Typically 0 means grant date.

businessContext_i18n.en: The month (relative to a reference) when the vesting period begins. Typically 0 means grant date.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hak ediş döneminin başladığı ay (bir referansa göre). Genellikle 0, hibe tarihini ifade eder.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Monat (relativ zu einem Referenzpunkt), in dem der Vesting-Zeitraum beginnt. Typischerweise 0 bedeutet Gewährungsdatum.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le mois (par rapport à une référence) où commence la période d'acquisition. Généralement 0 signifie date d'attribution.

inputs.label: Current Month
inputs.businessContext: The current month number from the vesting start to calculate vested shares.

businessContext_i18n.en: The current month number from the vesting start to calculate vested shares.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hak edilen hisseleri hesaplamak için hak ediş başlangıcından itibaren geçerli ay numarası.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die aktuelle Monatsnummer ab Vesting-Beginn zur Berechnung der unverfallbaren Aktien.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le numéro du mois en cours depuis le début de l'acquisition pour calculer les actions acquises.

inputs.label: Vesting Period (Full Term)
inputs.businessContext: Total duration in months over which the grant fully vests.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total duration in months over which the grant fully vests.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hibenin tamamen hak edildiği toplam süre (ay olarak).
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtdauer in Monaten, über die die Zuteilung vollständig unverfallbar wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Durée totale en mois sur laquelle l'attribution est entièrement acquise.

inputs.label: Cliff Period
inputs.businessContext: Initial period where no vesting occurs. After cliff, vesting may be accelerated or linear.

businessContext_i18n.en: Initial period where no vesting occurs. After cliff, vesting may be accelerated or linear.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hiçbir hak edişin olmadığı başlangıç dönemi. Uçurumdan sonra hak ediş hızlandırılabilir veya doğrusal olabilir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anfangszeitraum ohne Vesting. Nach der Sperrfrist kann das Vesting beschleunigt oder linear erfolgen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Période initiale sans acquisition. Après le cliff, l'acquisition peut être accélérée ou linéaire.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
